requirements.description: buildKeywordFaqs() generates 4 questions that each explicitly target a keyword from the matrix (primary keyword + secondary keywords[0,2,4]). buildUniqueFaqs() now returns 4 keyword-targeted FAQs + 4 from the existing shuffle pool = 8 total.

buildPrimaryKeyword(cityName, architecture, tier) generates a deterministic, architecture-aware primary keyword. Premium → 'verified escorts', nightlife → 'nightlife escorts', business_traveler → 'discreet escorts', etc. Seeded via hashString for reproducibility.

buildSecondaryKeywords(c) returns 8 keywords targeting long-tail variations: 'call girls in {city}', 'escort service in {city}', '{neighborhood} escorts', 'independent escorts {city}', 'massage in {city}', '{city} adult services', '{state} escorts', 'verified escorts {city}'.

requirements.requirement: Store primary keyword on SEO pages
requirements.description: Added primaryKeyword TEXT column to SeoPage via migration 20260531000000_seo_keywords. updateSeoPageKeywords() saves via $executeRaw (Prisma client DLL locked by dev process). upsertFromContent() calls updateSeoPageKeywords() after upsert when keywords are present.

requirements.requirement: Store secondary keywords on SEO pages
requirements.description: Added secondaryKeywords TEXT column to SeoPage. Stored as JSON-serialised array (JSON.stringify). Reads back via JSON.parse. Same raw SQL path as primary keyword.

requirements.requirement: Embed 3 contextual internal links inside article body
requirements.description: insertContextualLinks() appends [text](url) markdown link sentences to sections at indices 0, 2, 4 (never the last trust-epilogue section). Links: (1) primary keyword → canonical city URL, (2) neighborhood escorts → city URL, (3) escorts in {city} → /category/escorts. SeoPageView.tsx now parses [anchor](url) markdown via parseBodyWithLinks() and renders as Next.js <Link> elements.

notImplemented: SeoKeyword table — not required by spec
SEO cron — not required by spec
Keyword density tracking — not required by spec

filesModified.change: Added primaryKeyword String? and secondaryKeywords String? to SeoPage model
New migration: ALTER TABLE SeoPage ADD COLUMN primaryKeyword TEXT and secondaryKeywords TEXT
Added primaryKeyword?: string and secondaryKeywords?: string[] to SEOContent interface

Added buildPrimaryKeyword, buildSecondaryKeywords, buildKeywordFaqs, insertContextualLinks. Updated buildUniqueFaqs signature. Updated buildV5CityContent and generateV5CitySEO to generate and return keyword data.
Added primaryKeyword/secondaryKeywords to UpsertSeoPageInput. Added updateSeoPageKeywords() raw SQL helper. Updated upsertFromContent() to persist keywords.
Added primaryKeyword/secondaryKeywords to v5CityToSEOContent and mergeV5CityBody return values.
Added parseBodyWithLinks() and BodyParagraph component. Updated SeoIntroContent to split section.body on \n\n and render each paragraph via BodyParagraph with inline link support.
